allow: PowerShell($mongo = Get-Process mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($mongo\) { "MongoDB process: RUNNING \(PID $\($mongo.Id\)\)" } else { "MongoDB process: NOT running" }; try { $c = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $c.Connect\('127.0.0.1',27017\); "Port 27017: OPEN"; $c.Close\(\) } catch { "Port 27017: CLOSED \($\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" }; "---"; "node: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Version\)")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Welcome\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; node server/server.js } ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\Welcome\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)\\Design scope and specifications\\Novora Dashboards.dc.html"; "Size: $\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length\) bytes"; "Lines: $\(\(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)")

PowerShell($client = Start-Job -Name nv_client -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Welcome\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm run client 2>&1 }; $server = Start-Job -Name nv_server -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Welcome\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; node server/server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; "===== CLIENT ====="; Receive-Job nv_client; "===== SERVER ====="; Receive-Job nv_server)

PowerShell(foreach \($id in 58816,36288,49052,24396,36496\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed $id" } catch { "Already gone: $id" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $c=New-Object Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $c.Connect\('127.0.0.1',5173\); "5173 still in use"; $c.Close\(\) } catch { "5173 is now FREE" })
